ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of product */,
  "units" INTEGER /* Units for the product */,
  "gross_weight" REAL /* Gross weight of the product */,
  "net_weight" REAL /* Net weight of the product */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the product */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the product */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (unique identifier for inventory management) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the product (in days) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to trigger a restock */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to avoid overstocking */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type (e.g., BOX, PALLET) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "is_hazardous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the product type is hazardous */,
  "storage_requirements" TEXT /* Special storage requirements (e.g., refrigerated, dry storage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours of the warehouse (e.g., 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM) */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the warehouse (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the minimum level */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the product is critical and should be prioritized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse from which the shipment is made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date of the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the carrier */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipment */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_carrier_id FOREIGN KEY ("carrier_id") REFERENCES carriers ("carrier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company (if applicable) */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., Net 30) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_details" (
  "shipment_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment detail record */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the shipment */,
  "weight" REAL /* Total weight of the product in the shipment */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the shipment */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the shipment */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the shipment */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the product in the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_details_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the supplier (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery (in days) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., Net 30) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "terms_of_payment" TEXT /* Terms of payment (e.g., Prepaid, COD) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the purchase order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking record */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being tracked */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status update */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival at the next location */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual time of arrival at the next location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the tracking update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse_manager, customer_service, logistics) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carriers" (
  "carrier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carrier */,
  "carrier_name" TEXT /* Name of the carrier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the carrier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the carrier */,
  "service_level" TEXT /* Service level provided by the carrier (e.g., Express, Standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("carrier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
